channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 55/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 55/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 27.5%.

item.title: The Times: Senior Greens urge party to step aside for Andy Burnham in Makerfield - The Times
item.description: Senior Greens urge party to step aside for Andy Burnham in Makerfield - The Times

item.title: The Guardian: Nicola Jennings on Andy Burnham and the forthcoming Labour leadership battle – cartoon - The Guardian
item.description: Nicola Jennings on Andy Burnham and the forthcoming Labour leadership battle – cartoon - The Guardian

item.title: Independent UK Politics: ‘Those girls deserve justice’: Minister’s emotional plea after boys spared jail for raping teenagers
item.description: ‘Those girls deserve justice’: Minister’s emotional plea after boys spared jail for raping teenagers

item.title: FT UK Politics: UK competition watchdog to examine childcare market
item.description: UK competition watchdog to examine childcare market

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Burnham ‘seeks advice’ from Starmer’s former chief of staff Sue Gray for potential government
item.description: Burnham ‘seeks advice’ from Starmer’s former chief of staff Sue Gray for potential government

item.title: i Politics: 'Embarrassing' texts to reveal ministers 'sucked up' to Mandelson
item.description: 'Embarrassing' texts to reveal ministers 'sucked up' to Mandelson

item.title: The Telegraph: Sadiq Khan: Starmer has failed to keep promises - The Telegraph
item.description: Sadiq Khan: Starmer has failed to keep promises - The Telegraph

item.title: BBC Politics: Girl raped by boys spared jail tells BBC judge's decision was like 'rock in my face'
item.description: Girl raped by boys spared jail tells BBC judge's decision was like 'rock in my face'

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Andy Burnham seeks advice from Sue Gray on forming future Labour government
item.description: Andy Burnham seeks advice from Sue Gray on forming future Labour government

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Burnham beats Reform in first Makerfield by-election poll – but only just
item.description: Burnham beats Reform in first Makerfield by-election poll – but only just
